title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCL. Love And Matrimony.
content:
As Tommy Snooks and Bessy Brooks
            Were walking out one Sunday,
        Says Tommy Snooks to Bessy Brooks,
            "To-morrow will be Monday."
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCCL. Love And Matrimony." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
